entities.name: SPATIAL VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation of a variable across a geographic area

entities.name: SEMI-ARID REGIONS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and irregular rainfall

entities.name: EXPERIMENTAL TRIALS
entities.description: Controlled tests conducted to evaluate agricultural or environmental variables

entities.name: RAINGAGES
entities.description: Instruments used to measure the amount of liquid precipitation over a set period of time

entities.name: ICRISAT SAHELIAN CENTER
entities.description: An agricultural research center operated by ICRISAT in the Sahel region

entities.name: RAINY SEASONS
entities.description: Periods of the year characterized by higher than average rainfall

entities.name: ISOHYETAL PATTERNS
entities.description: The mapping of lines connecting points of equal rainfall

entities.name: TOTAL VOLUME
entities.description: The total amount of rainfall during a storm or season

entities.name: DURATION
entities.description: The length of time a rain storm lasts

entities.name: DIRECTION
entities.description: The orientation or path of storm movement

entities.name: INTENSITY
entities.description: The rate of rainfall per unit of time

entities.name: SPATIAL CORRELATIONS
entities.description: The statistical relationship between rainfall measurements at different locations

entities.name: VARIOGRAMS
entities.description: A tool used in geostatistics to describe the spatial continuity of a variable

entities.name: POINT RAINFALL MEASUREMENTS
entities.description: Rainfall measured at a specific single location

entities.name: AREAL RAINFALL ESTIMATES
entities.description: The estimated average rainfall over a specific area
